steps.name: Chop Rhubarb and Mix
steps.description: Chop rhubarb, add the brown sugar, into pan.

steps.name: Prepare Crumble
steps.description: Rub together the flour and butter, then stir in the white sugar

steps.name: Sprinkle
steps.description: Sprinkle the crumble over the rhubarb

steps.name: Sweeten
steps.description: Sprinkle brown sugar over the crumble for that extra crunch.

steps.name: Serve
steps.description: Serve to the eager guests, warning them that it'll be hot and will keep them regular.
